ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty rank */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic discipline */,
  "years_phd" INTEGER /* Years since obtaining a Ph.D. */,
  "years_service" INTEGER /* Years of service at the university */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the faculty member */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the faculty member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "research_areas" TEXT /* Research areas of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the faculty member */,
  "workload" INTEGER /* Workload of the faculty member */,
  "research_contributions" INTEGER /* Research contributions of the faculty member */,
  "promotion_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last promotion */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  "minimum_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the rank */,
  "maximum_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the rank */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for promotion to the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_phd" (
  "phd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Ph.D. record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "years_since_phd" INTEGER /* Years since the faculty member obtained a Ph.D. */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the Ph.D. was obtained */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the Ph.D. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_phd_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_service" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service at the university */,
  "previous_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the faculty member previously worked */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., teaching, research, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_service_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "annual_salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the faculty member */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was last updated */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for salary adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_salaries_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the faculty member */,
  "preferred_pronouns" TEXT /* Preferred pronouns of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_sex_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each faculty member
